title: Mediator Pattern
subtitle: Replace peer-to-peer mesh with a central coordination hub

panels.heading: Without Mediator
bullets: A ↔ B, A ↔ C, B ↔ C, B ↔ D
Adding one peer = touching many others

panels.heading: With Mediator
bullets: All peers talk only to Mediator
Adding peer = register with hub only

panels.heading: Key Trap
bullets: Colleagues still call each other directly

footer: Mediator = central hub for peer coordination. If only one-way notification, that's Observer. If simplifying API, that's Facade.
